section: AP 10: The Respiratory Tract, Pleura, and Mediastinum
allocation_strategy: Clinical judgment and educational efficiency prioritizing high-yield lung pathology

questions.topic: Squamous cell carcinoma: keratinization patterns & staging
questions.education_objective: Recognize squamous cell carcinoma morphologic variants and apply staging criteria
Identify adenocarcinoma patterns and correlate with molecular markers

questions.topic: Small cell vs. large cell neuroendocrine differential
questions.education_objective: Distinguish small cell from large cell neuroendocrine carcinoma using morphology and markers
Differentiate typical from atypical carcinoid using mitotic count and necrosis

questions.topic: Metastatic tumors to lung: common patterns & primaries
questions.education_objective: Identify metastatic patterns and determine likely primary sites using morphology

questions.topic: Sarcomatoid carcinoma vs. true pulmonary sarcoma
questions.education_objective: Distinguish sarcomatoid carcinoma from primary sarcoma using immunohistochemistry

questions.topic: Diffuse alveolar damage: acute vs. organizing phases
questions.education_objective: Recognize DAD temporal phases and understand clinical correlation
Identify sarcoid granulomas and distinguish from other granulomatous diseases

questions.topic: BOOP vs. other organizing pneumonia patterns
questions.education_objective: Recognize BOOP morphology and distinguish from other organizing patterns

questions.topic: UIP vs. NSIP: pattern recognition & prognosis
questions.education_objective: Differentiate UIP from NSIP patterns and correlate with prognosis
Recognize HP patterns and correlate with exposure history
Differentiate mesothelioma subtypes and apply diagnostic criteria
Distinguish pleural mesothelioma from metastatic adenocarcinoma using immunomarkers
Recognize sclerosing pneumocytoma morphology and confirm diagnosis
Identify pulmonary hypertension morphologic changes and grade severity

questions.topic: Hamartoma vs. other benign lung tumors
questions.education_objective: Diagnose pulmonary hamartoma and distinguish from other benign lesions

questions.topic: Pulmonary lymphomas: MALToma vs. other types
questions.education_objective: Classify pulmonary lymphomas and recognize MALToma patterns
Recognize eosinophilic pneumonia and distinguish causes
Differentiate respiratory bronchiolitis from desquamative interstitial pneumonia
Recognize solitary fibrous tumor morphology and immunophenotype
Distinguish thymoma from thymic carcinoma and apply WHO classification
Classify mediastinal germ cell tumors and correlate with serum markers
Recognize pulmonary LCH and confirm with immunohistochemistry
Identify PAP morphology and understand pathogenesis variants
Classify mediastinal neurogenic tumors and recognize schwannoma features
